title: Work effectively in a biosecurity emergency response
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work effectively in a biosecurity emergency response demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
